prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains to water quality monitoring and regulations set out in the Environmental Targets (Water) (England) Regulations 2023, which explicitly apply to England. The use of the term 'England and Wales' throughout reinforces that the information and regulations discussed are relevant to England.
